description: VSVG_tag — 11-aa epitope tag (YTDIEMNRLGK) from the cytoplasmic tail of Vesicular stomatitis Indiana virus glycoprotein; detected by the P5D4 monoclonal antibody for immunodetection, immunoprecipitation, and affinity purification.

references.title: Microinjected antibodies against the cytoplasmic domain of vesicular stomatitis virus glycoprotein block its transport to the cell surface.
Altered cytoplasmic domains affect intracellular transport of the vesicular stomatitis virus glycoprotein.
Small epitope-linker modules for PCR-based C-terminal tagging in Saccharomyces cerevisiae.

references.authors: Shevtsova Z, Malik JMI, Michel U, Scholl U, Bahr M, Kugler S
references.title: Evaluation of epitope tags for protein detection after in vivo CNS gene transfer.

references.authors: Munis AM, Tijani M, Hassall M, Mattiuzzo G, Collins MK, Takeuchi Y
references.title: Characterization of Antibody Interactions with the G Protein of Vesicular Stomatitis Virus Indiana Strain and Other Vesiculovirus G Proteins.

label: VSVG_tag
note: 11-aa epitope tag YTDIEMNRLGK, derived from the cytoplasmic tail (C-terminal residues 501–511) of Vesicular stomatitis Indiana virus glycoprotein (VSV-G). Recognised by the P5D4 monoclonal antibody, widely used for protein detection, immunoprecipitation, and affinity purification. The tag acts as a single binding epitope with no functional sub-elements.

provenance.sequence_source: UniProt:P03522 (Glycoprotein, Vesicular stomatitis Indiana virus strain San Juan), residues 501–511 (C-terminal 11 aa of 511), exact match 100% (11/11 aa), independently fetched and compared via UniProt REST API

functional_claims.label: The VSVG tag (YTDIEMNRLGK) is recognised by the P5D4 monoclonal antibody raised against the cytoplasmic domain of VSV-G, enabling immunodetection (Western blot, immunofluorescence, immunoprecipitation) and affinity purification of fusion proteins.

value.mechanism: epitope tag — P5D4 monoclonal antibody recognition

source.quote: Microinjected antibodies against the cytoplasmic domain of vesicular stomatitis virus glycoprotein block its transport to the cell surface

functional_claims.label: The P5D4 monoclonal antibody was raised against the 15 C-terminal residues of VSV-G (aa 497–511) and its epitope maps to the five carboxy-terminal amino acids; the 11-aa YTDIEMNRLGK tag contains this minimal epitope.

source.quote: generation of P5D4 monoclonal antibody against the 15 C-terminal residues (497-511) of VSV-G and maps the P5D4 epitope to the five carboxy-terminal amino acids

functional_claims.label: The VSVG tag has been validated for protein tagging in multiple hosts including mammalian cells and Saccharomyces cerevisiae, with utility in in vivo CNS gene transfer contexts.

source.quote: Small epitope-linker modules for PCR-based C-terminal tagging in Saccharomyces cerevisiae

functional_claims.label: The VSVG tag sequence is derived from the cytoplasmic tail of VSV-G, a region required for Golgi-to-plasma-membrane transport; when used as a short peptide tag it does not confer transmembrane anchoring.

value.origin: cytoplasmic tail of VSV-G glycoprotein (Indiana strain, San Juan)
value.note: As a free peptide tag it lacks the adjacent transmembrane domain and therefore does not anchor proteins to membranes.

source.quote: Altered cytoplasmic domains affect intracellular transport of the vesicular stomatitis virus glycoprotein

functional_claims.label: The P5D4 antibody specifically recognises VSVind.G (Indiana serotype) cytoplasmic tail; reactivity against G proteins from other vesiculovirus serotypes varies, confirming the YTDIEMNRLGK epitope as Indiana-serotype-specific.

value.cross_reactivity: variable across other vesiculovirus G proteins

source.quote: Characterizes monoclonal antibodies against VSVind.G and maps their epitopes; confirms P5D4 recognises the YTDIEMNRLGK (aa 501-511) epitope in the cytoplasmic tail

functional_claims.label: The VSVG tag is validated as one of 10 short epitope tags for PCR-based C-terminal protein tagging in S. cerevisiae, compatible with Western blot detection and affinity purification.

value.tag_set: one of 10 validated short epitope tags

source.quote: demonstrates VSV-G tag as one of 10 validated short epitope tags for PCR-based C-terminal protein tagging in yeast; validates its use in WB and affinity purification
